mapper.select: SELECT name AS "name", content AS "content" FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}

SELECT NVL(ROUND((price - s.prev_price) / NULLIF(s.prev_price, 0) * 100), 0) as Range FROM (SELECT o.price FROM TRANSACTION t JOIN ORDERS o ON t.buy_order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.stock_no = #{stockNo} ORDER BY t.TRANSACTION_DATE DESC), stocks s WHERE ROWNUM = 1 AND s.stock_no = #{stockNo}
SELECT prev_price FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN content='매수' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) AS amount FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state='체결'
SELECT total_point FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS (order_no, content, price, amount, state, order_date, student_id, stock_no) VALUES (order_no_seq.NEXTVAL, #{content}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{state}, SYSDATE, #{studentId}, #{stockNo})
mapper.select: SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND STATE = '대기' ORDER BY order_date ASC
SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND STATE = '대기' AND content = '매도' ORDER BY order_date ASC
SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND STATE = '대기' AND content = '매수' ORDER BY order_date ASC

SELECT order_no AS "orderNo", CONTENT AS "content", PRICE AS "price", AMOUNT AS "amount", ORDER_DATE AS "orderDate", STATE AS "state" FROM ORDERS WHERE STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND STOCK_NO = #{stockNo} AND state ='대기' ORDER BY ORDER_DATE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point + #{totalPoint} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - #{totalPoint} WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (transaction_no, transaction_date, buy_order_no, sell_order_no) VALUES (transaction_no_seq.NEXTVAL, SYSDATE, #{buyOrderNo}, #{sellOrderNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET state = '대기' WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE orders SET state = '체결' WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE orders SET state = '취소' WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
mapper.select: SELECT publication_balance AS "pubAmount", publication_price AS "pubPrice" FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET publication_balance = publication_balance - #{amount} WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
mapper.select: SELECT order_no AS "orderNo", content AS "content", price AS "price", amount AS "amount", state AS "state", order_date AS "orderDate", student_id AS "studentId", stock_no AS "stockNo" FROM orders WHERE order_no = (SELECT order_no FROM (SELECT order_no FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = '대기' AND content = #{content} AND price = #{price} AND amount = #{amount} AND student_id != #{studentId} ORDER BY order_date ASC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) FOR UPDATE
